title: Documentation, APIs, Licenses, and Generated-Artifact Gates · Risk Brief: Readme Setup
summary: Keep human and machine contracts synchronized with implementation. Planned artifact: Add and verify the gates readme setup increment in a documentation and contract drift suite. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Test README setup and core commands from a clean environment.
Run expensive dynamic checks in a documented matrix with symbolized actionable output.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
